title: Publisher Confirms, Windows, and Ambiguity · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a bounded Go confirm-window ledger with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a bounded Go confirm-window ledger and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enable confirm mode before publication, continuously consume confirmations, and account for ack, nack, return, close, and unresolved sequence state.
Bound unconfirmed count, bytes, and age while preserving throughput, memory, fairness, and per-message outcome evidence; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Explain when confirms occur for unroutable messages, persistent classic queues, quorum queues, and multiple routed queues; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Order the regression proof · Debug Publisher Ledger Cleanup

content.text: A debug Go messaging team handles case 3802 during table-driven topology review for a tenant migration. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound outstanding confirms and preserve ambiguity when a channel closes before proof; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then close the owning channel before one delivery decision. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Retire confirmed sequence entries, reject nacked entries, preserve ambiguous entries, cancel waiters, and prove no ledger or goroutine leak across generations.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Publisher Ledger Cleanup
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: rabbit-go-publisher-ledger-cleanup-b1jnzm" that uses case 7749 to bound outstanding confirms and preserve ambiguity when a channel closes before proof. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import amqp091-go, open sockets, contact RabbitMQ, Docker, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, execute host commands, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5 compile, vet, race, fuzz, leak, amqp091-go 1.12.0, RabbitMQ 4.3, TLS, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production gates.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Publisher Ledger Cleanup.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Publisher Ledger Cleanup into observable performance evidence. For RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Publisher Ledger Cleanup, keep Publisher Ledger Cleanup connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Publisher Ledger Cleanup structural check is only one gate. a bounded Go confirm-window ledger must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

hints: For RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Publisher Ledger Cleanup, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Publisher Ledger Cleanup precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Publisher Ledger Cleanup, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A debug Go messaging team handles case 8659 during stream-versus-queue architecture board. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound outstanding confirms and preserve ambiguity when a channel closes before proof; retain screen-reader-readable topology and delivery evidence; then lower the byte and goroutine budget and preserve rejection evidence. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Retire confirmed sequence entries, reject nacked entries, preserve ambiguous entries, cancel waiters, and prove no ledger or goroutine leak across generations.

For RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Publisher Ledger Cleanup, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Automatic connection recovery reconstructs the application confirm ledger and resolves every previous publication.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Publisher Ledger Cleanup
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Publisher Ledger Cleanup: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Go messaging team handles case 7754 during quorum failover exercise during a rolling broker restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to bound outstanding confirms and preserve ambiguity when a channel closes before proof; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Retire confirmed sequence entries, reject nacked entries, preserve ambiguous entries, cancel waiters, and prove no ledger or goroutine leak across generations.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Publisher Ledger Cleanup.
steps.why: Retrieving Publisher Ledger Cleanup through the concrete a bounded Go confirm-window ledger case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For RabbitMQ and Go Publish the incident record · Debug Publisher Ledger Cleanup, keep Publisher Ledger Cleanup connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Retire confirmed sequence entries, reject nacked entries, preserve ambiguous entries, cancel waiters, and prove no ledger or goroutine leak across generations.
